response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software development with diverse experience across various technologies and domains. While his experience doesn't directly align with AI strategy, he has worked on projects involving complex systems and has shown innovation in his work with GISCollective and other projects. His technical skills and problem-solving abilities are notable.
strengths: Diverse technical expertise across multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with complex systems and innovative projects like GISCollective
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Limited direct experience in AI and cloud technologies
No clear evidence of working on AI-powered product development or AI strategy
Not directly matching the 15 years of experience in software, hardware, or infrastructure engineering focused on technical innovation and engineering leadership
